content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market under pressure (Nifty -1.11%, Bank Nifty -1.42%, VIX +5.33% to 18.37) on Brent at ~$120 spike following Trump's Iran-port blockade announcement. Energy/upstream and gold are the bid; financials and autos under pressure. Existing book is in solid shape (+0.94% day, +9.5K unrealized). Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners; selective new exposure only in the strongest macro-aligned setups (CPCL refining, ONGC upstream).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +6.2% unrealized at ₹1045. Current SL 1025 already above entry 984 — locks ~4% gain. Trailing SL up to 1029 (just below S2 1029, ~1.5% below CMP) maintains trail-gap discipline while tightening locked-in profit. Strong Q4 (PAT +19.2%, GNPA sub-1%), ICICI Sec target 1350. Hold for further upside toward target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -2.6% unrealized at ₹121.86, SL 119 (~2.4% below CMP). Macro tailwinds intact — Iran blockade, Brent $120, weak INR, VIX spike — gold should re-accelerate. SL 119 is appropriate; not tightening because position is below entry and gold's intraday range easily exceeds tighter trails. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +3.1% at ₹1456. SL 1438 already above entry 1412 — breakeven+ locked. Not tightening further: HUL Q4 results today is the FMCG sector binary read — if HUL prints weak, NESTLEIND could give back today's gains, and a tighter SL would whipsaw. SL 1438 is ~1.3% below CMP, appropriate trail-gap. Holding values unchanged is a HOLD; emitting this MODIFY only because per-rules I should not stack micro-MODIFYs — actually correcting: this is a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +2.6% at ₹1779. SL 1760 above entry 1734 — locks ~1.5% gain. Organon deal positive but Q4 results May 19 is a binary event. Currently 19 sessions away — not yet within 3-session catalyst rule. SL 1760 appropriate (~1.1% below CMP). Hold; will reassess and exit/trim before May 19 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BANDHANBNK -1.8% at ₹196.42. Stock gapped +10% on Q4 (PAT +68%) but bulk of beat priced in (NII only +1.4%, Nuvama HOLD target 190 below CMP). SL 195 is just ~0.7% below CMP — tight enough already; not loosening. Holding through to see if breakout above 198 holds; if 195 breaks, EXIT triggers automatically. Won't trail tighter — too close to LTP would whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GLENMARK +0.6% at ₹2415, near ATH (2427). SL 2295 is ~5% below CMP — wide because position is fresh (held 0 days) and ATR is high. Not trailing tighter yet — momentum thesis (USFDA approvals, Ryaltris control, Strong Buy upgrade) needs room. Will reassess next session if it pushes through 2427 with volume."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 165,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 302.00,
      "stop_loss": 290.00,
      "target": 322.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "ONGC at fresh 52-week high ₹302 on Brent +8% to $120. Pure upstream beneficiary — net realisation gearing makes it the cleanest large-cap expression of crude shock. Bullish Marubozu Apr 28, 2.2x volume, MACD bullish crossover, above all SMAs. Q4 results May 21 (15 sessions away — outside 3-session binary rule). Position size: 165 × 302 = ~₹49,830 (~5% of capital). SL at 290 (~4% below entry), Target 322 (~6.6%). R:R = 1:1.65. Risk budget = 5% × 4% = 0.20% portfolio — within 0.5% cap. Energy sector currently 0% — no cluster issue. Diversifies into the standout macro-winning theme."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 45,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1120.00,
      "stop_loss": 1075.00,
      "target": 1200.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CPCL stellar Q4 already out (PAT +203%, GRM $13.75/bbl, FY26 PAT +1349%, ₹54 final dividend = ~5% yield). Fresh ATH breakout above prior 52-w high ₹1103 on 2.2x volume. Middle-distillate cracks at all-time highs ($290/bbl Singapore) sustain refining margin tailwind while Hormuz disrupted. Position size: 45 × 1120 = ~₹50,400 (~5% of capital). SL 1075 (~4% below entry), Target 1200 (~7.1%). R:R = 1:1.78. Risk budget = 5% × 4% = 0.20% — within cap. Note: ONGC + CPCL both energy-themed but different drivers (upstream vs refining margin) — within cluster discipline (2 new in unheld cluster ≤ 2)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +23%, AUM ₹5L cr) but stock up 15% in past month — bulk of beat priced in. Financial services cohort under macro pressure (RECLTD/PFC selling off, FII outflows). Don't chase post-result momentum into a weak-tape sector when rate-sensitive financials are at risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held; not adding to underwater position chasing the gap-up after the result is digested."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today post-market — explicit binary event within 0 sessions. Per rules, NO new entry into a name with binary catalyst within 3 sessions unless event-trade sized. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ITC catalyst is a media report on cigarette price hike — not company-confirmed. Already up 4% on the rumor. Already have FMCG exposure via NESTLEIND. Pass on stacking another FMCG name on rumor."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +5.5% near 52-w high — chasing breakout. Q4 results May 8-11 (~6 sessions away — close to binary rule edge). Already 2 new energy/macro plays today (ONGC, CPCL) — cluster discipline argues against a third Hormuz-disruption beneficiary."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just out (Apr 29) — strong beat but stock at ₹6967 already +5% post-print, well above some fair-value estimates. Chasing post-result momentum into rich valuation. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.55% YoY — first earnings miss in several quarters. O2C drag offsets upstream tailwind. Bounce today is technical, not thesis-driven. Pass — pure ONGC is a cleaner crude-spike expression."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1025 to 1029 — locks 4.6% gain on +6.2% winner. Tighter trail-gap (1.5% below CMP 1045) appropriate given run-up. Hold for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 ~2.4% below CMP, gold thesis intact on macro shock; let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1438 above entry, breakeven+ locked. Don't tighten before HUL Q4 read-through tonight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1760 above entry, locked. Q4 results May 19 — will exit/trim before that 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 above entry locks gain. Energy momentum intact, near 52w high; not tightening further to give breakout room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 195 only 0.7% below CMP — already tight. Either gap-fill recovers thesis or stops out cleanly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2295 wide because position fresh; momentum thesis (ATH, USFDA approvals) needs room. Reassess next session."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GESHIP and NAVINFLUOR remain on watch — would re-engage on a pullback rather than chasing extended bars. HINDUNILVR Q4 print tonight is the key sector read — if positive surprise, consider adding to FMCG; if disappointment, may need to trim NESTLEIND.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is healthy at +0.94% on the day with 5 of 7 positions in profit and SLs above entry on 4 winners. Adding ONGC + CPCL takes deployed from 45% to ~55% — still well below 80% soft cap, with ~₹248K remaining deployable. Sector exposure post-adds: FMCG ~12%, Pharma ~12%, Financials ~28% (BANDHAN+PNBHOUSING), Energy ~10% (ONGC+CPCL+COALINDIA), Healthcare ~5%, Gold ~5%. All within 35% sector cap. Two open pending orders (PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) from prior sessions are stale — should review next tick whether to cancel given regime shift to crude-themed leadership."
}
